mapper.sql: tree_code AS treeCode, tree_name AS treeName, parent_code AS parentCode, parent_codes AS parentCodes, tree_sort AS treeSort, tree_sorts AS treeSorts, tree_leaf AS treeLeaf, tree_level AS treeLevel, tree_names AS treeNames, status, create_date AS createDate, update_date AS updateDate, count, video_id AS videoId, user_id AS userId, thumbs_up AS thumbsUp
mapper.select: SELECT tree_code treeCode, tree_name treeName, parent_code parentCode, parent_codes parentCodes, tree_sort treeSort, tree_sorts treeSorts, tree_leaf treeLeaf, tree_level treeLevel, tree_names treeNames, status status, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate, video_id videoId, user_id userId, thumbs_up thumbsUp FROM app_video_comments WHERE parent_code = #{parentCode}

SELECT tree_code treeCode, tree_name treeName, parent_code parentCode, parent_codes parentCodes, tree_sort treeSort, tree_sorts treeSorts, tree_leaf treeLeaf, tree_level treeLevel, tree_names treeNames, status status, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate, video_id videoId, user_id userId, thumbs_up thumbsUp FROM app_video_comments WHERE tree_code = #{parentCode}

SELECT tree_code treeCode, tree_name treeName, parent_code parentCode, parent_codes parentCodes, tree_sort treeSort, tree_sorts treeSorts, tree_leaf treeLeaf, tree_level treeLevel, tree_names treeNames, status status, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate, video_id videoId, user_id userId, thumbs_up thumbsUp FROM app_video_comments WHERE parent_code = 0 ORDER BY tree_code desc LIMIT 0,1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_video_comments WHERE video_id = #{videoId} AND status = 0 AND type = #{type}

SELECT a.tree_code treeCode, a.tree_name treeName, a.parent_code parentCode, a.parent_codes parentCodes, a.tree_sort treeSort, a.tree_sorts treeSorts, a.tree_leaf treeLeaf, a.tree_level treeLevel, a.tree_names treeNames, a.status status, a.count, a.create_date createDate, a.update_date updateDate, a.video_id videoId, a.user_id userId, a.thumbs_up thumbsUp, b.`name` `name`, b.avatar avatar FROM app_video_comments AS a LEFT JOIN app_user AS b ON a.user_id = b.id WHERE parent_code = 0 AND video_id = #{videoId} AND type = #{type} ORDER BY tree_code LIMIT #{pages},5
SELECT MAX(CAST(tree_code as SIGNED INTEGER)) treeCode FROM app_video_comments WHERE parent_code = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_video_comments WHERE parent_id = #{treeCode};

SELECT a.tree_code treeCode, a.tree_name treeName, a.parent_code parentCode, a.parent_codes parentCodes, a.tree_sort treeSort, a.tree_sorts treeSorts, a.tree_leaf treeLeaf, a.tree_level treeLevel, a.tree_names treeNames, a.status status, a.count, a.create_date createDate, a.update_date updateDate, a.video_id videoId, a.user_id userId, a.thumbs_up thumbsUp, a.parent_id parentId, b.`name` `name`, b.avatar avatar FROM app_video_comments AS a LEFT JOIN app_user AS b ON a.user_id = b.id WHERE a.parent_id = #{treeCode} AND type = #{type} ORDER BY tree_code LIMIT #{pages},5
